payload.answer: Request denied. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands or delete memory cards.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command from a normal user and does not provide durable user memory to store.

repair_options: Use an authorized admin channel/account for administrative operations.
If you want to delete your own memories, request a scoped user memory deletion through the normal deletion workflow.
